name: SaveAndQueueEmail
concept: Queue transactional email for asynchronous delivery via gateway

observed_implementation.signature: Save(fromEmail, fromName, sendTo, sendToName, replyTo, subject, body, testMode, categoryEnum, bccEmails, priorityOrder, externalRefId, smsLogId, attachments, isCcOrBcc, sendFast)
observed_implementation.workflow: 1. Create EmailMessage (Status=Importing). 2. Set Status=Queued. 3. If sendFast=true: push to ISingleSendGridProcessingChannel. 4. Else: background polling picks up. 5. Store EmailAttachment rows (binary in DB). 6. Support semicolon-separated sendTo and bccEmails.

normalized_interpretation.Parameters: 17 params → 4 core: Recipient, Subject, Body, Options(priority, attachments, testMode)
normalized_interpretation.Channels: Dual dispatch (sendFast vs background polling) → single async queue
normalized_interpretation.Attachments: Separate save call → owned collection in command

trigger: Any system-initiated email: password reset, user creation, broadcast receipt, approval notification, webhook alarm, weekly report, support inquiry, subscription import receipt

rethink.observed: Save(fromEmail, fromName, sendTo, sendToName, replyTo, subject, body, testMode, categoryEnum, bccEmails, priorityOrder, externalRefId, smsLogId, attachments, isCcOrBcc, sendFast)
rethink.proposal: SaveEmailCommand with 4 properties: From, Recipients[], Content, Options

rethink.problem: Dual dispatch path (sendFast vs background polling)
rethink.observed: sendFast=true → ISingleSendGridProcessingChannel, else background service polls
rethink.proposal: Single async queue with priority (urgent messages processed first)

name: SendEmailMessages(bulk)
concept: Queue bulk email delivery to multiple recipients (broadcast receipt use case)

observed_implementation.signature: SendEmailMessages(IEnumerable<EmailRecipientDto>, fromEmail, fromName, replyTo, subject, body, testMode, categoryEnum, ...)
observed_implementation.workflow: Loops EmailRecipientDto collection, calls Save() once per recipient. Used for broadcast receipt emails (multiple recipients, same message).

normalized_interpretation.Batch: N Save() calls → single batch insert with recipient collection

rethink.proposal: Batch insert with Recipients[] collection (single DB round-trip)

name: GetTemplateAndMerge
concept: Retrieve localized email template, wrap in master layout, merge placeholder fields

observed_implementation.workflow: 1. Fetch named EmailTemplate by (languageId, templateName). 2. Fetch MasterTemplate for same languageId. 3. Replace $$MAIN_CONTENT$$ in MasterTemplate with named template HTML. 4. MergeEmailFields() substitutes {{key}} placeholders with values. 5. Return merged EmailTemplate.

normalized_interpretation.Localization: LanguageId FK lookup → CultureInfo + resource files

trigger: Any service building email before calling IEmailService.Save()

rethink.proposal: Industry-standard Liquid templating ({{user.name}}, {% if %}) or Razor

rethink.problem: Master template wrapping enforced at runtime
rethink.observed: GetTemplateByNameEnum() manually injects named template into MasterTemplate HTML

name: SendGridDelivery
concept: Background worker polls queued emails and dispatches to SendGrid API with lifecycle tracking

observed_implementation.workflow: Background service (SendGridWorkloadProcessor / SingleSendGridProcessingChannel) polls: SELECT * FROM EmailMessages WHERE Status=Queued ORDER BY PriorityOrder. For each message: 1. Read body+attachments. 2. POST to SendGrid API via HttpClient. 3. On success: Status=SentToGateway, store XmessageId. 4. On failure: Status=SentToGatewayFailed or queue retry (QueuedFirstRetry/QueuedSecondRetry).

normalized_interpretation.Worker: Polling background service → Event-driven queue consumer (RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus)
normalized_interpretation.Retry: Manual retry states (QueuedFirstRetry, QueuedSecondRetry) → exponential backoff policy

trigger: Background service polling (continuous). SendFast path: channel push

rethink.observed: Background service queries DB every N seconds: SELECT * WHERE Status=Queued
rethink.proposal: Event-driven queue (Azure Service Bus, RabbitMQ) with pub/sub
Retry policy config (max attempts, backoff) with metadata column (not status enum)

name: SendGridWebhookProcessing
concept: Receive SendGrid delivery status webhooks and inbound email-to-SMS gateway messages

observed_implementation.workflow: InboundParseEventHandler receives POST /api/inbound from SendGrid. Two use cases: (1) Delivery status webhooks: map SendGrid event type to EmailStatus enum, call UpdateEmailMessageStatusesAsync(). Rules: Delivered→Opened and Delivered→Delivered ignored (no downgrade). (2) Inbound email parse (Email2SMS): check Email2SmsWhitelistEntries — if sender whitelisted for profile, parse email body → trigger SMS send.

normalized_interpretation.Webhook: Generic HTTP POST handler → typed webhook event processor (SendGridWebhookEvent)
normalized_interpretation.StatusMapping: String comparison to enum → event type pattern matching

rethink.problem: Two unrelated concerns in one handler (status update + Email2SMS)
rethink.observed: InboundParseEventHandler handles both delivery status webhooks AND Email2SMS gateway
Hardcoded rule: Delivered→Opened ignored, Delivered→Delivered ignored
rethink.proposal: Status transition validation in DeliveryStatus value object (FSM pattern)

name: BroadcastReceiptEmail
concept: Generate and send broadcast completion receipt email with statistics

observed_implementation.workflow: 1. EmailContentGeneratorFactory selects generator based on SmsGroup type (ByAddress, ByStandardReceivers). 2. Generate content with statistics, recipient counts, channel breakdown. 3. Send to first email as main receiver + optional additional recipients.

normalized_interpretation.ContentGeneration: Factory pattern (ByAddress/ByStandardReceivers) → strategy pattern with polymorphic BroadcastType
normalized_interpretation.Statistics: Manual aggregation → CQRS read model (BroadcastStatistics query)

rethink.observed: Factory selects generator based on group type (ByAddress, ByStandardReceivers, etc.)
rethink.proposal: Strategy pattern: BroadcastType enum → IBroadcastContentGenerator implementation

rethink.problem: Statistics aggregated on-demand at send time
rethink.observed: SmsGroupStatistics queried when generating receipt email
rethink.proposal: CQRS read model: BroadcastStatistics updated on event completion (cached)

name: UpdatedTemplatesFromResources
concept: Sync email templates from embedded resources to database on deployment

observed_implementation.workflow: 1. Read embedded HTML resource files (bundled in assembly). 2. Compare to DB templates. 3. Upsert changed templates. 4. Ensures DB template content stays in sync with deployed code.

normalized_interpretation.Sync: Manual upsert → migration script or startup seed data

trigger: App startup or admin manual trigger

rethink.problem: Templates stored in DB but source is embedded resources (dual source of truth)
rethink.observed: Embedded resources bundled in assembly, synced to DB on startup
rethink.proposal: Single source: file-based templates (wwwroot/templates/) with fallback to DB for user overrides

rethink.problem: Manual sync on startup (can fail silently)
